reason: Source-of-truth for OpenCode level vocab, per-provider validity, budget values (anthropic high=16000/max=31999, google 2.5), and config keys (provider.<id>.models.<id>.options/variants, agent variant) the ReasoningEffort enum + resolver must mirror.

This task adds a reasoning config field that flows opencode.json -> AgentSpec.reasoning -> CompletionRequest -> provider wire across layers; reason through the boundaries and avoid a second projection path.
Modifying ReasoningEffort budget constants and extracting merge_json_value from agent_catalog into a shared json_merge helper; search-first, do not duplicate the deep-merge.
